summary: Iteration 5 - All critical features tested and PASSED. Contact page with Google Maps iframe working, Footer with white text on dark background working, Admin Parametres page fully functional with all sections, Settings modification reflects on footer and contact page, Scroll-to-top on page navigation and reservation step change working, All APIs functional.

minor.issue: FIXED: Missing sendEmail export - routes.js imported sendEmail but email.js only exported sendReservationConfirmation. Added sendEmail function.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified. Google Maps iframe loads correctly with Espace Anjou location. Footer text is white (rgb(255,255,255) and rgba variants). Admin Parametres has all 4 sections (Informations generales, Adresse, Reseaux sociaux, Horaires). Settings changes reflect immediately on footer and contact page. ScrollToTop works on page navigation and reservation step changes.

contact_page_form.details: Contact form visible with all fields (nom, email, telephone, message, submit button)

contact_page_google_maps.details: Google Maps iframe visible with correct embed URL pointing to 'Espace Anjou, 49000 Angers'

footer_text_color.details: Footer text colors: rgb(255,255,255), rgba(255,255,255,0.8), rgba(255,255,255,0.6) - all white/light on dark background

footer_content.details: Shows 'Glow & Shape', 'Espace Anjou', '49000 Angers', quick links (Accueil, Nos prestations, Avant/Apres, Contact, Reserver en ligne), social icons

admin_parametres_page.details: Page loads with all 4 sections: Informations generales, Adresse, Reseaux sociaux, Horaires d'ouverture

admin_parametres_fields.details: All fields present: nom_institut, adresse, ville, telephone, email, facebook_url, instagram_url, horaires

admin_settings_modification.details: Modified address to 'TEST Espace Anjou Modified', saved, verified change on contact page and footer, then reverted successfully

scroll_to_top_page_navigation.details: ScrollToTop component works - scroll position goes to 0 when navigating between pages

scroll_to_top_reservation_steps.details: Reservation page scrolls to top on step 1->2 and step 2->3 transitions

api_site_settings_get.details: GET /api/site-settings returns correct data with Espace Anjou, 49000 Angers, contact.glowshape49@gmail.com

api_site_settings_put.details: PUT /api/admin/site-settings updates settings correctly with admin token

email_resend.details: Email via Resend is MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY set). The service logs but does not send actual emails. This is expected behavior per requirements.
